![](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/209714/200123867-db9bd406-54d7-4ce0-aa09-1ec30740a87a.jpg)

## Overview

ggrepel provides geoms for [ggplot2](https://ggplot2.tidyverse.org/) to
repel overlapping text labels:

- [`geom_text_repel()`](https://ggrepel.slowkow.com/reference/geom_text_repel.md)
- [`geom_label_repel()`](https://ggrepel.slowkow.com/reference/geom_text_repel.md)

Text labels repel away from each other, away from data points, and away
from edges of the plotting area.

``` r
library(ggrepel)
ggplot(mtcars, aes(wt, mpg, label = rownames(mtcars))) +
  geom_text_repel() +
  geom_point(color = 'red') +
  theme_classic(base_size = 16)
```

## Installation

``` r
# The easiest way to get ggrepel is to install it from CRAN:
install.packages("ggrepel")

# Or get the latest development version from GitHub:
# install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("slowkow/ggrepel")
```

## Getting help

Check out the
[examples](https://ggrepel.slowkow.com/articles/examples.md) to learn
how to use ggrepel in your project.

See our collection of [related
work](https://ggrepel.slowkow.com/articles/related-work.md) for similar
R packages, Python packages, and more.

If you have an issue with ggrepel or ggplot2, someone might already have
experienced it. Try searching the web, or create a new post:

1.  The [Posit community](https://forum.posit.co) is an active forum
    with R users.

2.  [Stack
    Overflow](https://stackoverflow.com/questions/tagged/ggrepel?sort=frequent&pageSize=50)
    has lots of questions and answers about ggplot2 and ggrepel.

## Examples

Click one of the images below to view the source code for that figure:

[![Hide some of the
labels](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/slowkow/ggrepel/master/docs/articles/examples_files/figure-html/empty_string-1.png)](https://ggrepel.slowkow.com/articles/examples.html#hide-some-of-the-labels)
[![Always show all labels, even when they have too many
overlaps](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/slowkow/ggrepel/master/docs/articles/examples_files/figure-html/show_all_labels-1.png)](https://ggrepel.slowkow.com/articles/examples.html#always-show-all-labels-even-when-they-have-too-many-overlaps)
[![Do not repel labels from data
points](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/slowkow/ggrepel/master/docs/articles/examples_files/figure-html/point_size_na-1.png)](https://ggrepel.slowkow.com/articles/examples.html#do-not-repel-labels-from-data-points)
[![Do not repel labels from plot (panel)
edges](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/slowkow/ggrepel/master/docs/articles/examples_files/figure-html/plot_edges-1.png)](https://ggrepel.slowkow.com/articles/examples.html#do-not-repel-labels-from-plot-panel-edges)
[![Expand the scale to make room for
labels](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/slowkow/ggrepel/master/docs/articles/examples_files/figure-html/expand_scale-1.png)](https://ggrepel.slowkow.com/articles/examples.html#expand-the-scale-to-make-room-for-labels)
[![Always (or never) draw line
segments](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/slowkow/ggrepel/master/docs/articles/examples_files/figure-html/all_segments-1.png)](https://ggrepel.slowkow.com/articles/examples.html#always-or-never-draw-line-segments)
[![Make curved line segments or
arrows](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/slowkow/ggrepel/master/docs/articles/examples_files/figure-html/line_curve-1.png)](https://ggrepel.slowkow.com/articles/examples.html#make-curved-line-segments-or-arrows)
[![Repel labels from data points with different
sizes](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/slowkow/ggrepel/master/docs/articles/examples_files/figure-html/point_size_cars-1.png)](https://ggrepel.slowkow.com/articles/examples.html#repel-labels-from-data-points-with-different-sizes)
[![Limit labels to a specific
area](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/slowkow/ggrepel/master/docs/articles/examples_files/figure-html/xlim-1.png)](https://ggrepel.slowkow.com/articles/examples.html#limit-labels-to-a-specific-area)
[![Remove “a” from the
legend](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/slowkow/ggrepel/master/docs/articles/examples_files/figure-html/remove_a_2-1.png)](https://ggrepel.slowkow.com/articles/examples.html#remove-a-from-the-legend)
[![Align labels on the top or bottom
edge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/slowkow/ggrepel/master/docs/articles/examples_files/figure-html/direction_x-1.png)](https://ggrepel.slowkow.com/articles/examples.html#align-labels-on-the-top-or-bottom-edge)
[![Align labels on the left or right
edge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/slowkow/ggrepel/master/docs/articles/examples_files/figure-html/direction_y-1.png)](https://ggrepel.slowkow.com/articles/examples.html#align-labels-on-the-left-or-right-edge)
[![Using ggrepel with
stat_summary()](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/slowkow/ggrepel/master/docs/articles/examples_files/figure-html/stat_summary-1.png)](https://ggrepel.slowkow.com/articles/examples.html#using-ggrepel-with-stat_summary)
[![Justify multiple lines of text with
hjust](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/slowkow/ggrepel/master/docs/articles/examples_files/figure-html/geom_text_repel-hjust-1.png)](https://ggrepel.slowkow.com/articles/examples.html#justify-multiple-lines-of-text-with-hjust)
[![Label jittered
points](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/slowkow/ggrepel/master/docs/articles/examples_files/figure-html/jitter-1.png)](https://ggrepel.slowkow.com/articles/examples.html#label-jittered-points)
[![Nudge labels in different directions with
ggpp](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/slowkow/ggrepel/master/docs/articles/examples_files/figure-html/position_nudge_center-1.png)](https://ggrepel.slowkow.com/articles/examples.html#nudge-labels-in-different-directions-with-ggpp)
[![Label sf
objects](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/slowkow/ggrepel/master/docs/articles/examples_files/figure-html/label-sf-objects-1.png)](https://ggrepel.slowkow.com/articles/examples.html#label-sf-objects)
[![Shadows (or glow) under text
labels](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/slowkow/ggrepel/master/docs/articles/examples_files/figure-html/shadowtext-1.png)](https://ggrepel.slowkow.com/articles/examples.html#shadows-or-glow-under-text-labels)
[![Verbose timing
information](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/slowkow/ggrepel/master/docs/articles/examples_files/figure-html/timing-1.png)](https://ggrepel.slowkow.com/articles/examples.html#verbose-timing-information)
[![Word
cloud](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/slowkow/ggrepel/master/docs/articles/examples_files/figure-html/wordcloud-1.png)](https://ggrepel.slowkow.com/articles/examples.html#word-cloud)
[![Polar
coordinates](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/slowkow/ggrepel/master/docs/articles/examples_files/figure-html/polar-1.png)](https://ggrepel.slowkow.com/articles/examples.html#polar-coordinates)
[![Unicode characters
(Japanese)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/slowkow/ggrepel/master/docs/articles/examples_files/figure-html/japanese-1.png)](https://ggrepel.slowkow.com/articles/examples.html#unicode-characters-japanese)
[![Mathematical
expressions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/slowkow/ggrepel/master/docs/articles/examples_files/figure-html/math-1.png)](https://ggrepel.slowkow.com/articles/examples.html#mathematical-expressions)

## Thanks

Thanks to everyone who has contributed pull requests, opened issues,
asked questions, and shared examples!

And thanks to [Allison Horst](https://github.com/allisonhorst) for the
beautiful artwork!

# Package index

## Reference

- [`geom_label_repel()`](https://ggrepel.slowkow.com/reference/geom_text_repel.md)
  [`geom_marquee_repel()`](https://ggrepel.slowkow.com/reference/geom_text_repel.md)
  [`geom_text_repel()`](https://ggrepel.slowkow.com/reference/geom_text_repel.md)
  : Repulsive textual annotations.
- [`position_nudge_repel()`](https://ggrepel.slowkow.com/reference/position_nudge_repel.md)
  : Nudge labels a fixed distance from points
- [`element_text_repel()`](https://ggrepel.slowkow.com/reference/element_text_repel.md)
  : Repulsive text element

### All vignettes

- [Getting started with
  ggrepel](https://ggrepel.slowkow.com/articles/ggrepel.md):
